name: Kainuu (Finland)

colors.symbolism: the sable field of the regional arms

description: A square black flag charged centrally with the gold and silver provincial arms of Kainuu, featuring a heraldic capercaillie and forest motifs.
history: Kainuu became a region under Finland's 1997 administrative reform; its banner is the heraldic flag of the regional coat of arms.

features.symbolism: a heraldic composition combining a flying capercaillie with elements drawn from the surrounding wilderness; the design references Kainuu's deep forests and historic frontier hunting culture.
